title: Research Index
blurb: swift-ownership-primitives has no in-package research documents at 0.1.0. Every ownership-relevant design decision crosses at least one other primitive (Identity / Tagged, Property, Buffer, or a capability-lift pattern), so the canonical research lives in the ecosystem-wide corpus at `/Users/coen/Developer/swift-institute/Research/` and the superrepo corpus at `/Users/coen/Developer/swift-primitives/Research/`. This index carries pointers, not copies. Package-specific research (if any is authored post-0.1.0) will be promoted here per the research-process skill.

documents.topic: Pre-0.1.0 per-type usage inventory and design evaluation. Surveys the ecosystem (swift-primitives, swift-standards, swift-foundations, swift-institute/Experiments) for consumers of each `Ownership.*` type, evaluates whether region-based isolation (SE-0430 sending + ~Sendable SE-0518) obsoletes any of them, and recommends DEPRECATE for `Ownership.Transfer.Storage` and `Ownership.Transfer.Box` (zero real consumers), KEEP with docstring narrowing for `Ownership.Unique` / `Ownership.Transfer.Cell` / `Ownership.Mutable`, DEFER `Ownership.Mutable.Unchecked` → `~Sendable` post-SE-0518, and KEEP all others.

crossRefDocuments.topic: Canonical protocol shape for `Ownership.Borrow.`Protocol`` — associatedtype `Borrowed` defaults to the sibling generic struct over `Self`. Frozen DECISION landed in commit `b3eb11b`.
Ecosystem-wide implementation plan for the `Ownership.Borrow.`Protocol`` unification. IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-23 across 7 sub-repos; zero residual `.View` references on the cascade surface.
Generalises the `Ownership.Borrow.`Protocol`` associatedtype-defaulting shape to other self-projection namespaces. The Borrow application is the first empirical ecosystem instance.
Capability-lift pattern — the `associatedtype default = Namespace<Self>` shape that `Ownership.Borrow.`Protocol`` uses.
Academic references grounding the capability-lift pattern.
Feature-flag choices around `BorrowAndMutateAccessors` (SE-0507) — the future state that makes `Ownership.Borrow._read` / `Ownership.Inout._modify` coroutines obsolete.
Motivates `Ownership.Borrow<~Escapable>` and the raw-address init path used for ~Escapable peek.
~Copyable closure-capture interactions that affect Ownership-type usage in `@Sendable` closures.
Consolidated current state of ~Copyable patterns across the ecosystem (supersedes `noncopyable-ownership-transfer-patterns.md`).
Coroutine-yielding vs plain-return lifetime models — informs the V12 `Ownership.Inout.value` accessor split (`get` + `_modify` for Copyable `Value`; `_read` + `_modify` for ~Copyable).
Naming conventions for nested view / borrowed types that affect `Ownership.Borrow` / `Ownership.Inout` adoption sites.
